task.title: Add boot prompt to orchestrator launch in synapse start

messages.content:
## Task

Add an initial boot prompt (task message) to the orchestrator when launched by `synapse start` / `synapse run --role orchestrator`.

## Context

File: `src/index.ts`

Currently the orchestrator is launched with no initial user message — it just gets the system prompt and sits idle. Workers get a `--task` flag with their task. We want the orchestrator to also receive a boot prompt as its first user message.

In the `run` command action (around line 191-260), after building `claudeArgs`, the code checks `if (task)` and pushes it. For workers, `options.task` is set; for orchestrators it isn't. We want to inject a default boot prompt for the orchestrator role.

## Boot prompt text to inject

```
You are now running as the Synapse orchestrator.

ROUTE ONLY — NEVER IMPLEMENT. You are a router. Do not read source files, run builds, or write code. Delegate every investigation and implementation to a worker.

Start by calling read_messages to check for pending operator instructions, then update_status(state="idle").
```

## What to change

In `src/index.ts`, in the `run` command action: if role is `orchestrator` and no `--task` was explicitly passed, use the above text as the default task prompt (passed as the positional arg to `claude`, same as workers).

Keep the existing `if (task)` logic — just set `task` to the boot prompt when role is orchestrator and no explicit task was given.

## Constraints

- Work inside `.synapse/worktrees/developer-33-orch-boot-prompt` — create this worktree first with `synapse worktree create developer-33-orch-boot-prompt`
- Commit there; do not push or merge
- Report DONE when committed

title: Add boot prompt to orchestrator launch in synapse start
label: good
